me.title: introduction
me.img_alt: Me sitting on the chair with curve desktop
me.git_content: I'm pretty solid with GitHub and working collaboratively on projects. And more, I am very active especially on Mondays! My preferred languages are Python, Java, and JavaScript, and an extensive amount of my work is proudly displayed on GitHub. I know everything that's necessary to know about GitHub and Git. I'm good at branching, merging, and resolving conflicts. I manage our projects using GitHub's features, such as issue tracking and project boards. Therefore, count me in for some intense coding sessions if you're searching for someone to collaborate with, especially on Mondays.

me.title: my story
me.content:
My journey into the field of information technology began when I was 13 years old, with a love for Python - the language that sparked my interest in coding. Because, at the time, I was a big fan of the Iron Man movie, and the Jarvis AI in it caught my interest in this sector. And, my world has been expanded with the many kind of possibilities as I continue to dig deeper and deeper.

Early on, I started with modest Flask projects, went through the web development world, and enjoyed the success of delivering my websites. Plus with each project, my abilities are improved, and my passion for creating digital places grew day by day.

At the age of 16, during a wave of academic challenges, I emerged with shining victories in my IGCSE, securing two A grades in Physics and Computer Science. However, shortages of time caused a stumble in other subjects. But, it made me overcome the most challenges.

In 2023, I plotted a new road by enrolling in the Level 3 Foundation Diploma course in IT Management, intending to obtain a Bachelor's degree in Software Engineering. Despite the scholastic challenges, my thirst for knowledge is still remained.

Moreover in my spare time, I immersed myself in a variety of languages and technologies such as Java, JS, ReactJS, and Python for Machine Learning and they became the foundation of my learning experience.

Now at the age of 18, I find myself at the crossroads of innovation and advancement. My desire to improve is still never-ending; each of my project serves as a canvas for polishing talents, and each difficulty presents an opportunity to innovate myself even more.

To end this story, with the passion of a lifelong learner, I will surely march forward, embracing the ever-changing world of technology and striving for mastery with every keyboard and line of code.

me.title: marquee
me.content: Hello everyone! Welcome from my personal website. You can see my latest post in my instragram ❤️
